expectations.text: Uses brave_web_search or web search with site:reddit.com filter
Identifies relevant subreddits discussing the topic
expectations.evidence: Identifies r/consulting, r/freelance, r/MachineLearning as relevant subreddits

expectations.text: Summarizes sentiment and key discussion themes
expectations.evidence: Sentiment: 'Mixed to Positive'. Themes include AI implementation consulting demand, pricing models, prompt engineering as a service, AI strategy consulting
Each theme and thread has confidence ratings (High/Medium/Low)
